name: Tomato-Cheese Pie with Crumb Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Combine the bread crumbs, melted butter, and grated Swiss cheese in a bowl.
3. Press the mixture into a greased 9-inch pie plate. Bake for 10 minutes.
4. Remove from the oven and lower the temperature to 350°F.
5. Spread the sliced tomatoes in an even layer over the crust.
6. Sprinkle with sugar, salt, pepper, dried basil, and chopped green onions.
7. In a separate bowl, mix the beaten eggs with milk and half the grated Swiss cheese. Pour this mixture over the tomatoes.
8. Bake for 30 minutes. Serves 6.
